# IP-010: Goroutine with taint — vulnerable (QUARANTINED / honest FN)

# G5 v0 does not model cross-goroutine channel handoff. The prior residual
# source-on-send attribution quirk is removed; this fixture must stay silent
# until a concurrent (MHP) contract ships. See documents/taint.md Limitations.
lang: go
file: IP-010-vulnerable.go
variant: taint
---
package sample

import (
    "net/http"
    "os"
)

func caller() {
    ch := make(chan string)
    go func() {
        s := <-ch
        os.Open(s)
    }()
    ch <- r.URL.Query().Get("input")
}
